name: qa_manager_add_or_remove_family_exception_on_error_rule_in_rule_set_json
desc: QA Manager rule exception editor: add or remove a bespoke family / type / system-type exception on an Error Manager rule INSIDE a named RuleSet JSON (not globally on the rule class). Targets property_name = ExcludedFamilyTypes | ExcludedFamilies | ExcludedSystemTypes | ExcludedTypes. Refuses to overwrite malformed existing lists. Default create_if_missing=false so a typo in rule_name surfaces as an error.

parameters.name: rule_set_name
parameters.description: Rule set name (no .json). Must already exist unless create_if_missing is true.

parameters.name: rule_name
parameters.description: Target rule's class-level RuleName (e.g. 'Accessible for Maintenance').

parameters.name: property_name
parameters.description: Excluded list property to modify: ExcludedFamilyTypes | ExcludedFamilies | ExcludedSystemTypes | ExcludedTypes. Default: ExcludedFamilyTypes.

parameters.name: family_or_type_values
parameters.description: Comma-separated values to add (or remove when action=remove). For ExcludedFamilyTypes use 'FamilyName:TypeName' format.

parameters.name: create_if_missing
parameters.description: When true and the named rule is not already in the rule set, create a new enabled entry before adding the exception. Default false so typos surface as errors.

keywords: bespoke family override for error rule
